queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of maintaining a critical account or holding other existing credits on consumer default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account contributes to elevated credit risk in retail lending.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the impact of negative checking account balances on the probability of loan default.
